name: Recursive Ancestral Terrains
description: Fractal landscape generator where terrain features carry genetic parameters from parent generations. The mouse position locally selects which ancestral lineage is expressed, creating alien mountain ranges with evolutionary history. Audio controls mutation rate and generational blending. Upgraded with golden ratio φ persistence, fractal dimension roughness control (Koch D=1.2619 to Sierpinski D=1.585), bass-driven erosion, mouse river carving, temporal sediment layers, ACES tone mapping, and chromatic aberration.

params.name: Mutation Rate
params.description: Rate of genetic mutation between terrain generations; also controls fractal dimension roughness

params.name: Erosion
params.description: Amount of geological erosion carving channels; bass-reactive
